current_suggestion.pitch: Your poker channels (GTO Wizard, GTO Lab, Alderman) are heavily solver-oriented, but Matt Berkey represents a serious counterweight: a high-stakes live cash professional who critiques over-reliance on GTO frameworks and argues for exploitative, reads-based play grounded in live dynamics. This steelmans an angle your current lineup largely ignores — that solver outputs can become a crutch that degrades real-time thinking. Format is a mix of solo breakdowns, hand history reviews, and podcast-style conversations, with consistent philosophical depth about decision-making under uncertainty that will also resonate with your interest in mental models and pressure.
